text:
group for the particular revenue center is located in the data field called the 
APC or HIPPS code variable. 
The APC is a four-byte field. 
The HIPPS code is a five-byte field (such as 1AFKS). 
SHORT NAME: APCHIPPS 
LONG NAME: REV_CNTR_APC_HIPPS_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
5 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
APC codes can be downloaded from the CMS website (reference: 
https://www.cms.gov/Medicare/Medicare-Fee-for-Service-
Payment/HospitalOutpatientPPS/passthrough_payment.html)
